entities.name: COMMUNAL IRRIGATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Irrigation systems managed by communities, specifically studied in South-Eastern Africa for productivity and profitability

entities.name: SOUTH-EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the communal irrigation systems were studied

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output efficiency of the irrigation schemes

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The measure of financial gain generated by the irrigation schemes

entities.name: IRRIGATED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of supplying water to crops through artificial means, planned for expansion in Africa

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where irrigated agriculture expansion is planned and where the studied schemes are located

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER SCHEMES
entities.description: Irrigation systems operated by small-scale farmers, noted for poor performance

entities.name: MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: One of the countries in South-Eastern Africa where the research schemes were located

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: One of the countries in South-Eastern Africa where the research schemes were located

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: One of the countries in South-Eastern Africa where the research schemes were located

entities.name: POOR MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The condition of inefficient administration that exacerbates problems in smallholder schemes

entities.name: MARKET LINKAGES
entities.description: The connections between farmers and markets, which are currently limited

entities.name: UNDERUTILIZATION
entities.description: The condition where irrigation systems are not used to their full potential due to limited market linkages

entities.name: LACK OF PROFIT
entities.description: The condition of failing to generate financial gain due to limited market linkages

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The long-term viability of complex irrigation systems

entities.name: INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Multiple actions at different scales required to improve system sustainability

entities.name: BUSINESS MODELS
entities.description: Appropriate frameworks required to enable farmers to operate profitably

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: The individuals operating the smallholder irrigation schemes
